initial_candidates.sql:
SELECT 
    CASE 
        WHEN age BETWEEN 20 AND 29 THEN '20s' 
        WHEN age BETWEEN 30 AND 39 THEN '30s' 
        WHEN age BETWEEN 40 AND 49 THEN '40s' 
        WHEN age BETWEEN 50 AND 59 THEN '50s' 
        ELSE 'others' 
    END AS age_category,
    COUNT(user_id) AS user_count
FROM (
    SELECT 
        user_id,
        (strftime('%Y', 'now') - strftime('%Y', birth_date)) - 
        (strftime('%m-%d', 'now') < strftime('%m-%d', birth_date)) AS age
    FROM mst_users
)
GROUP BY 
    CASE 
        WHEN age BETWEEN 20 AND 29 THEN '20s' 
        WHEN age BETWEEN 30 AND 39 THEN '30s' 
        WHEN age BETWEEN 40 AND 49 THEN '40s' 
        WHEN age BETWEEN 50 AND 59 THEN '50s' 
        ELSE 'others' 
    END;

SELECT 
    CASE 
        WHEN age BETWEEN 20 AND 29 THEN '20s' 
        WHEN age BETWEEN 30 AND 39 THEN '30s' 
        WHEN age BETWEEN 40 AND 49 THEN '40s' 
        WHEN age BETWEEN 50 AND 59 THEN '50s' 
        ELSE 'others' 
    END AS age_category,
    COUNT(user_id) AS user_count
FROM (
    SELECT 
        user_id,
        (strftime('%Y', 'now') - strftime('%Y', birth_date)) - 
        (strftime('%m-%d', 'now') < strftime('%m-%d', birth_date)) AS age
    FROM mst_users
)
GROUP BY age_category;

SELECT 
    CASE 
        WHEN age BETWEEN 20 AND 29 THEN '20s' 
        WHEN age BETWEEN 30 AND 39 THEN '30s' 
        WHEN age BETWEEN 40 AND 49 THEN '40s' 
        WHEN age BETWEEN 50 AND 59 THEN '50s' 
        ELSE 'others' 
    END AS age_category,
    COUNT(user_id) AS user_count
FROM (
    SELECT 
        user_id,
        CAST((strftime('%Y', 'now') - strftime('%Y', birth_date)) AS INTEGER) - 
        (CASE WHEN strftime('%m%d', 'now') < strftime('%m%d', birth_date) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS age
    FROM mst_users
) AS user_ages
GROUP BY 
    CASE 
        WHEN age BETWEEN 20 AND 29 THEN '20s' 
        WHEN age BETWEEN 30 AND 39 THEN '30s' 
        WHEN age BETWEEN 40 AND 49 THEN '40s' 
        WHEN age BETWEEN 50 AND 59 THEN '50s' 
        ELSE 'others' 
    END;

SELECT 
  CASE 
    WHEN age BETWEEN 20 AND 29 THEN '20s' 
    WHEN age BETWEEN 30 AND 39 THEN '30s' 
    WHEN age BETWEEN 40 AND 49 THEN '40s' 
    WHEN age BETWEEN 50 AND 59 THEN '50s' 
    ELSE 'others' 
  END AS age_category,
  COUNT(user_id) AS user_count
FROM (
  SELECT 
    user_id,
    (strftime('%Y', 'now') - strftime('%Y', birth_date)) - 
    (strftime('%m-%d', 'now') < strftime('%m-%d', birth_date)) AS age
  FROM mst_users
) 
GROUP BY 
  CASE 
    WHEN age BETWEEN 20 AND 29 THEN '20s' 
    WHEN age BETWEEN 30 AND 39 THEN '30s' 
    WHEN age BETWEEN 40 AND 49 THEN '40s' 
    WHEN age BETWEEN 50 AND 59 THEN '50s' 
    ELSE 'others' 
  END;

SELECT 
    CASE 
        WHEN age BETWEEN 20 AND 29 THEN '20s' 
        WHEN age BETWEEN 30 AND 39 THEN '30s' 
        WHEN age BETWEEN 40 AND 49 THEN '40s' 
        WHEN age BETWEEN 50 AND 59 THEN '50s' 
        ELSE 'others' 
    END AS age_category,
    COUNT(user_id) AS user_count
FROM (
    SELECT 
        user_id,
        CAST((strftime('%Y', 'now') - strftime('%Y', birth_date)) AS INTEGER) - 
        (CASE 
            WHEN strftime('%m%d', 'now') < strftime('%m%d', birth_date) THEN 1 
            ELSE 0 
        END) AS age
    FROM mst_users
)
GROUP BY 
    CASE 
        WHEN age BETWEEN 20 AND 29 THEN '20s' 
        WHEN age BETWEEN 30 AND 39 THEN '30s' 
        WHEN age BETWEEN 40 AND 49 THEN '40s' 
        WHEN age BETWEEN 50 AND 59 THEN '50s' 
        ELSE 'others' 
    END;
